abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.text: After this model ends a Charge action in base contact with any other models, it may deal 1 damage to itself. If it does so, deal 1 damage to all other models in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Filthy Spear
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage if it was generated by the Charge action.

triggers.name: Rear Up
triggers.text: Once per activation. Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)2" of this model

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models.

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz. Move this model up to 5".
actions.effects: Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.
